---
name: Workflow request
about: Suggest a new revenue automation workflow
title: "[Workflow]: "
labels: workflow-request
assignees: ""
---

## Revenue problem

What revenue, recovery, follow-up, payment, or upsell problem should this workflow solve?

## Target user

Who needs it? Founder, small business, agency, freelancer, or another user type?

## Inputs

What data should the workflow consume?

## Outputs

What should the workflow produce?

## Required integrations

List expected tools, credentials, or platforms.

## Safety notes

Should this workflow require human approval before sending messages or changing external systems?
